note: Per-family skill->spec map for the FlowMCP Schemas Specification. Schema-AUTHORING implementer skills stay PRIVATE and are NOT listed (F9=A, Memo 060 Z5-14). The usage/routing skills below ARE listed (Memo 157 PRD-10): they implement the Agent CLI Usage Contract (specification/26-agent-cli-usage). Both carry visibility:internal, so the bridge withholds them from the public projection while keeping the map the single source of truth for the edge.
